mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO room_mapping_channel (room_id, channel_code, sort_order, label) VALUES
(#{r.roomId}, #{r.channelCode}, #{r.sortOrder}, #{r.label})
mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id AS roomId, channel_code AS channelCode, sort_order AS sortOrder, label, created_at AS createdAt FROM room_mapping_channel WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
